title: Deluxe King Room
description: Experience ultimate comfort and luxury in our spacious Deluxe King Room. Thoughtfully designed with refined furnishings, premium amenities, and sweeping views that make every stay truly memorable.
detailDescription: Experience ultimate comfort and luxury in our spacious Deluxe King Room. Thoughtfully designed with refined furnishings, premium amenities, and sweeping lake views, it creates a restful retreat for both short escapes and longer stays.
From the plush king bed to the calm seating corner and elegant bathroom, every detail is arranged to deliver a warm, refined stay with the signature hospitality of Yellow Pagoda.

title: Deluxe Twin Room
description: Relax in style with our elegant Deluxe Twin Room, perfect for two. Featuring warm tones, modern comforts, and a tranquil garden outlook that invites you to unwind completely.
detailDescription: Relax in style with our elegant Deluxe Twin Room, a bright and welcoming space tailored for friends, colleagues, or small families seeking comfort and convenience.
With twin bedding, calming interiors, and a refreshing garden outlook, this room balances practicality and warmth while keeping premium amenities close at hand.

title: Superior King Room
description: Indulge in sophistication and comfort with our spacious Superior King Room. Elevated finishes, a plush king bed, and panoramic mountain vistas create an atmosphere of refined luxury.
detailDescription: Indulge in sophistication and comfort with our spacious Superior King Room, where elevated finishes and panoramic mountain views create an atmosphere of refined luxury.
Ideal for guests who want a little more serenity, this room combines a generous layout, a plush king bed, and modern conveniences for a polished stay.

title: Superior Twin Room
description: Enjoy unmatched comfort and style in our spacious Superior Twin Room. Ideal for friends or families, this beautifully appointed room offers generous space, modern amenities, and serene pool views.
detailDescription: Enjoy unmatched comfort and style in our spacious Superior Twin Room, ideal for friends or families who want both flexibility and a polished hospitality experience.
The inviting twin-bed layout, peaceful pool outlook, and generous room design make it easy to settle in, recharge, and enjoy every part of your stay.

title: Executive Suite
description: Elevate your stay with our luxurious Executive Suite, where comfort meets sophistication. A private living area, premium furnishings, and sweeping panoramic views define this pinnacle of Yellow Pagoda hospitality.
detailDescription: Elevate your stay with our luxurious Executive Suite, where comfort meets sophistication through a private living space, generous layout, and sweeping panoramic views.
Designed for guests who appreciate extra room and quiet refinement, this suite delivers a premium experience with elegant furnishings and the signature warmth of Yellow Pagoda.
